_note: Baseline snapshot of Epic 100 audit counters. INVARIANTS block CI when above target (exit 1). INFORMATIONAL counters report leak surface / historical drift and never fail the build. Re-snap on VM after each story merges via `npx tsx scripts/audit-epic-100.ts --json > tests/fixtures/epic-100-audit-baseline.json`. #1008: added composeGenericNounFallbackCount, composeMemorylessReminisceCount, composeCallCounterIncoherent (target 0 each). Initial baseline=0 pending re-snap on DEV after deploy. #1016 (AnyVoice): added vapiNamedColumnsOnCallModel + vapiToolDefinitionsConstantPresent. Post-epic (#1015 closed): both now read 0. Build-time enforced by hf-voice/no-vapi-column-ref + hf-voice/no-vapi-tool-definitions-const ESLint rules from #1024.

counters.description: PlaybookSubject rows where (playbookId, subjectId) has duplicates — same subject linked twice to same playbook.

ContentAssertion rows whose category is an INSTRUCTION_CATEGORY but whose teachMethod is NOT 'tutor_instruction' (includes null and any learner-facing method like 'recall_quiz' / 'guided_discussion' / etc.). Widened from the narrow recall_quiz-only query on 2026-05-23 after a wizard run surfaced 53 guided_discussion violations on legacy QUESTION_BANK sources. Drains via `scripts/backfill-teach-methods.ts` pass 2; re-snap this baseline after running --apply on DEV.

INFORMATIONAL (leak surface). Count of ContentQuestion rows with assessmentUse='TUTOR_ONLY' present in the DB. #606's runtime fix filters these at the loader; rows are not deleted. Vitest in #648 proves the loader filter holds. This count reflects authored content surface area, not learner-prompt exposure.

INFORMATIONAL (historical drift). CallerAttribute rows where two lo_mastery:* keys for the same caller resolve to the same LO under different module-token forms (name vs slug). #611 Fix A makes all NEW writes canonical (slug-only via resolveModuleByLogicalId); this count reflects pre-#611 historical state and only drains as #614's migration runs.

INFORMATIONAL (historical drift). Calls with >40 CallScore rows all scored exactly 0 — symptom of the missing evidence-gate on AGGREGATE writes. #611 Fix B added the gate for all NEW writes; this count reflects pre-#611 historical state and only drains via a future CallScore cleanup migration.
LearningObjective rows whose moduleId references a CurriculumModule that no longer exists.
ContentAssertion rows with non-null learningObjectiveId where the LearningObjective no longer exists (soft-FK).
Active ComposedPrompt rows whose inputs.specUsed JSON contains 'spec-advisor-001' (SYSTEM-scope IDENTITY leaking into playbook-scope prompts).
CallerAttribute rows whose lo_mastery key contains uppercase letters or spaces in the module token — old name-form, awaiting migration to slug-form.
Playbook rows with no teachingMode set — #604's archetype-aware criticalRules needs this populated to take effect.
Count of files under lib/prompt/composition/transforms/ that still contain hardcoded behavioural strings (e.g. 'ALWAYS review', 'If RETURNING_CALLER'). Static grep, not a DB query.

Count of ACTIVE ComposedPrompt rows whose `prompt` markdown contains a generic-noun fallback phrase ('previous concept' / 'next concept' / 'first concept'). Catches the I-C4 anti-pattern (chain-contracts.md Link 3 → COMPOSE→LLM). Build-time ESLint rule hf-compose/no-orphan-instruction-fallback prevents new sites; this counter measures legacy prompts in the DB. Initial baseline=0; re-snap on DEV after deploy to capture the real count.
Count of ACTIVE ComposedPrompt rows where the prompt contains a reminisce-class imperative AND the caller has zero CallerMemory rows. Catches the I-C3 anti-pattern (#1006 Maya class).
Count of ACTIVE ComposedPrompt rows whose prompt body contains two or more DIFFERENT `(call #N)` references. Catches the I-C2 anti-pattern (#1006 Maya class).

Count of vapi-prefixed columns on the Call model in prisma/schema.prisma. Catches the I-VP3 anti-pattern. #1020 renamed all 6 to voice* + added voiceProviderRaw Json. Build-time enforced by ESLint rule hf-voice/no-vapi-column-ref (#1024). Static grep over the Call model block. Post-epic value: 0.

Presence (0 or 1) of the VAPI_TOOL_DEFINITIONS TypeScript constant outside _archived/. Catches the I-VP2 anti-pattern. #1019 migrated the array into the TOOLS-001 spec and removed the constant. Build-time enforced by ESLint rule hf-voice/no-vapi-tool-definitions-const (#1024). Post-epic value: 0.
